description_long: This is a large, modern office desk with a dark wood finish and a rectangular main surface, complemented by a rounded extension on one side. The desk features a set of three white drawers on the right, providing ample storage, and a cabinet with a door and open shelving on the left. A frosted glass or acrylic privacy panel runs along the back edge, partially framed by a white panel, adding a contemporary touch and some separation from the environment. The desk's understructure includes a curved modesty panel and open leg space for comfortable seating. The materials and construction suggest durability and a professional appearance, suitable for high-traffic or executive settings. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, with clean lines and a mix of dark and light finishes.
description: A large, modern office desk with a dark wood top, white drawers, a side cabinet, and a frosted privacy panel. It features a rounded extension and a contemporary, professional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, three white drawers on the right, a cabinet with a door and open shelf on the left, and the privacy panel at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the rounded extension, with the privacy panel visible along the back edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the modesty panel, the open leg space, and the full width of the privacy panel and back structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rounded extension and the open shelving beneath the cabinet, with the privacy panel running along the back.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and cabinet accessible, with the privacy panel and modesty panel at the back, and the rounded extension to the left.
